spec_match.rationale: Uses beforetoggle as the animation entry hook and toggle as the resolution hook on <dialog> — the canonical replacement for the mutation-observer dance.

interactive.rationale: Open/close button with transition class applied; real animation visible.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises a beforetoggle-driven animation hook with @starting-style; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Demo doesn't show what happens when the user opens, then quickly closes mid-transition (event ordering across rapid state flips). Doesn't show the without-beforetoggle baseline so the visitor understands the improvement.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, transitions use design system tokens.

openQuestions.title: Show the mutation-observer baseline
openQuestions.detail: The lede claims animating dialog open/close used to require a MutationObserver. Add a 'old way' tab that ships the MutationObserver code so the visitor sees the contrast.

openQuestions.title: Probe rapid open-close-open behaviour
openQuestions.detail: Add a 'stress test' button that opens and closes 5 times in 100ms — visitor sees event ordering land predictably (or not) under rapid state changes.

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 2 follow-up question(s) remain.
